The '''Agamarian Council''' was the ruling body of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]]. The council was headquartered in the [[Council Center]] at [[Calna Muun]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], it was led by a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Speaker/Legends|Speaker]] who was probably a [[Muun/Legends|Muun]].

{{Company-stub}}
